question: When did Audrey make muffins for herself?
reasoning: Session 3 takes place on Sunday, April 16, 2023. D3:18: 'Since you metioned pastries, I made some of my favorite treats last week.' (blip_caption: 'a photo of a muffin pan filled with blueberries and muffins'). The answer is defensible under one valid calendar convention but may penalize systems using the other.
correct_answer: Either April 3-9 (Monday-start convention) or April 9-15 (Sunday-start convention), depending on calendar interpretation.
